name: Ingredient: Lemon, Pineapple, Orange
usage: Displayed on a sand-colored (#F5EDE0) card in a 2-column ingredient grid. Cut-out PNG style floating on the card. This should be the most vibrant and fresh-feeling of all the ingredient images — a burst of citrus color. Displayed at approximately 16:9 landscape, 400-500px wide, 200-250px tall.
prompt: A composition of freshly cut citrus fruits arranged in a loose natural cluster on a solid warm sand background (#F5EDE0) for clean extraction. Center: a lemon cut in half showing the bright yellow cross-section with visible segments and seeds. Right: a thick round orange slice showing deep orange flesh with the peel ring. Left: a triangular wedge of fresh pineapple showing the golden yellow flesh with a small section of spiky skin still attached. The fruits overlap slightly at their edges, creating a natural grouping — not a perfect line. Each cut surface glistens with fresh juice. A few tiny juice droplets sit on the invisible surface near the fruits. The colors pop vibrantly: bright lemon yellow, deep sunset orange, golden pineapple yellow. Studio lighting is bright and clean with a slight cool-warm balance to make the colors sing.

scene.background: solid warm sand (#F5EDE0), matches the card background so edges blend naturally
scene.surface: invisible, tiny juice droplets and soft contact shadows

subject.description: half lemon, thick orange slice, pineapple wedge — all freshly cut, glistening with juice, arranged in a loose overlapping cluster

camera.depth_of_field: deep, all fruits in sharp focus

lighting.direction: overhead from slightly behind, creating glistening highlights on juice

style: vibrant food photography, maximum freshness, Colors should pop — think food magazine cover, not muted editorial
negative: no bowls or plates, no brown/wilted edges, no dried-out appearance, no text, no watermarks, no muted colors, no green background
